text.title: Research Repo File-Naming Convention Worked Example
text.summary: One end-to-end worked example for Research Repo File-Naming Convention: trigger fires, inputs gathered, artefact produced and validated against output contract.

example.title: Happy-path application
example.trigger: Operator opens calendar slot named in Applies If; preconditions are met.
example.validation: Run scripts/validate-research-repo-file-naming-convention.py against the produced artefact. Expected exit 0 (ok).
example.downstream: Artefact handed off to the consumers named in Related; outcome reviewed at next iteration.

example.title: Un-anchored application
example.trigger: Operator skipped Applies If gate; preconditions not verified.
example.inputs: Free-text prose substitutes; no cited evidence.
example.validation: Validator returns non-zero with violation list per forbidden patterns in content/02-output-contract.xml.
example.downstream: Artefact rejected; consumers do not read; operator reruns with full preconditions.
